commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh In that day also they shall come even to you from Assyria, and from the fortified cities, and from the fortress even to the river, and from sea to sea, and from mountain to mountain. Hebrew also, "Egypt, and from Egypt to the river Euphrates "The Jews shall occupy their ancient limits, Amos viii. (Calmet) The fenced cities may be Pelusium, Gaza, Tyre From all parts the captives shall return. (Haydock) They were very numerous under the Machabees, and in the time of Christ.
